title: Trial Chamber Time Remover
description: Removes cooldowns from Trial & Ominous Vaults, allowing unlimited vault usage with trial keys. Works on both client and server with no configuration needed.
body:
🔓 Unlimited Trial Vault Access — No More Cooldowns!

Say goodbye to waiting! This lightweight Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.8 removes cooldown timers from both Trial Vaults and Ominous Vaults, letting you use your trial keys as many times as you want — without needing to hunt for new Trial Chambers or sit around waiting for resets.

✨ Key Features

⛔ No Cooldowns
Removes timer restrictions from Trial Vaults & Ominous Vaults.

♾️ Unlimited Vault Usage
Reuse trial keys endlessly for faster gameplay progression.

🌐 Client & Server Support
Works flawlessly in both single-player and multiplayer.

⚙️ Zero Configuration
Just install and play — no setup required.

Perfect for adventurers who want constant loot, faster exploring, and to make the most of every trial key. Keep the action going — every vault, every time!
